title: Nananthus thudichumii
taxonomy: Nananthus thudichumii is classified as a species of flowering succulent in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the carpet-weed or vygie family. This family is part of the order Caryophyllales, which also includes other flowering plants such as cacti and succulents. Within the Aizoaceae family, Nananthus thudichumii is further classified as a genus in the subfamily Ruschioideae. The Ruschioideae subfamily is one of the main subfamilies within the Aizoaceae family, known for its diverse range of succulent species. The classification of Nananthus thudichumii reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations as a succulent plant.
